title: A Resolution and adopting the Municipal Risk Reduction and Management Council (MDRRMC) Resolution No. 2025-07 dated July 25, 2025, entitled, "Resolution approving the Supplemental Investment Plan under the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund CY 2025 - 70% thematic areas amounting to One Hundred Thousand Pesos (Php 100,000.00)."
